ground_truth.title: BruceClay - Expert SEO Consultant Services - Search Engine Optimization Consulting
ground_truth.main_content: SEO Consultant Services: What Are SEO Consultants? An SEO consultant is a search engine optimization expert or agency you hire to meet your search marketing needs. SEO consultants perform many services, use an array of SEO software tools, and then offer expert advice at a strategic and tactical level to meet their client's needs. Today, an SEO consultant requires surgeon-level skill with the ability to know the issues and solve problems. At Bruce Clay Inc., we consider an analyst an expert only if they have 10+ years of experience with a deep understanding of SEO. This expert has demonstrated expertise and authority, having earned industry trust as a search engine optimization professional. SEO consulting projects typically range from 3 to 6 months in duration. They are sometimes shorter or longer depending on the size of the campaign. In contrast, SEO services tend to focus on longer term opportunities ranging from six to many months. Why Use Expert SEO Consulting? You would generally use an expert SEO consultant because you cannot afford not to or you have identified a first-mover advantage and need to move accurately and quickly. An SEO consultant can provide an invaluable service for a business of any size, whether your company is a small business, start-up, challenger brand, or enterprise. Bruce Clay is a leading agency delivering SEO consulting and search marketing services since 1996. Testimonial: 'We hired Bruce Clay, Inc. to advise us through a major site migration. They were an invaluable help in migrating our site smoothly! We were impressed by how responsive and knowledgeable the analyst and other BCI staff were before, during and after.' Examples of SEO Services: 1. Gain traffic for your money-making keywords. 2. Move rankings currently on Page 2 or 3 to Page 1. 3. Acquire competitive keyword market share. 4. Improve mobile rankings to mirror desktop rankings. 5. Implement a global or multilingual site architecture. 6. Merge many domains and transfer link equity. 7. Speed up page-load time to help boost rankings. 8. Remove a ranking penalty or filter. 9. Implement schema markup, JSON-LD, and microdata. 10. Maximize local traffic opportunities from mobile and Google My Business. FAQ: Why should I use expert SEO consulting services to grow my business? Strategic Keyword Optimization: Expert SEO consultants possess an in-depth understanding of keyword research and optimization, helping your business target the right keywords. Technical SEO Excellence: SEO consultants ensure your website is optimized for search engine crawlers, improving indexing and site speed. Content Optimization and Quality: Quality content is the backbone of effective SEO. Competitive Edge: SEO consultants conduct competitor analysis to identify gaps and opportunities. Measurable Results: They provide detailed reports and analytics to evaluate effects. Step-by-Step Procedure: 1. Identify your business goals and objectives. 2. Research and shortlist reputable SEO consulting firms. 3. Schedule consultations to discuss needs. 4. Develop a tailored strategy. 5. Conduct comprehensive keyword research. 6. Implement on-page SEO techniques. 7. Improve technical aspects including speed and mobile friendliness. 8. Develop optimized content. 9. Evaluate website performance. 10. Perform regular SEO audits.

At Bruce Clay Inc., we consider an analyst an expert only if they have 10+ years of experience with a deep understanding of SEO.
An SEO consultant can provide an invaluable service for a business of any size, whether your company is a small business, start-up, challenger brand, or enterprise.
Expert SEO consultants possess an in-depth understanding of keyword research and optimization.
They provide detailed reports and analytics, which allow you to make more informed decisions and enhance your strategies.
